puzzles.name: The Wall Safe
puzzles.description: A heavy iron safe set into the wall behind a painting. It requires a three-number combination.
clues: Mrs. Pembrook mentioned Lady Thornwood's favorite numbers.
The book 'The Art of Deception' has numbers underlined on pages 8, 23, and 42.
A slip of paper in the desk drawer reads: 'Remember August 23rd, '42.'

puzzles.name: The Torn Letter
puzzles.description: Two halves of a torn letter. Piece them together to reveal the full message.
clues: The first half mentions the estate and forgiveness.
The second half was found in Mr. Graves' room.
The key word connects both halves of the letter.
